variables.input_text: Google, headquartered in Mountain View (1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy, Mountain View, CA 940430), unveiled the new Android phone for $799 at the Consumer Electronic Show. Sundar Pichai said in his keynote that users love their new Android phones.

actions.script: var nlApp = document.querySelector('nl-app'); if (!nlApp) return null; nlApp.input = '${input_text}'; if (typeof nlApp.set === 'function') { nlApp.set('input', '${input_text}'); } var root = nlApp.shadowRoot || nlApp; var textarea = root.querySelector('textarea'); if (textarea) { textarea.value = '${input_text}'; textarea.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true })); textarea.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true, composed: true })); } await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1000); }); return 'text_entered_polymer_input_' + (nlApp.input ? 'set' : 'unset');

var nlApp = document.querySelector('nl-app'); if (!nlApp) return null; var root = nlApp.shadowRoot || nlApp; var btn = root.querySelector('paper-button[track-name="click-analyze"]') || root.querySelector('paper-button'); if (!btn) { var allEls = root.querySelectorAll('*'); for (var i = 0; i < allEls.length; i++) { if (allEls[i].tagName && allEls[i].tagName.toLowerCase() === 'paper-button') { btn = allEls[i]; break; } } } if (!btn) { var allBtns = root.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"]'); for (var i = 0; i < allBtns.length; i++) { if (allBtns[i].textContent.toLowerCase().includes('analyze')) { btn = allBtns[i]; break; } } } if (!btn) return 'no_btn'; btn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 500); }); btn.click(); return 'analyze_clicked';

var nlApp = document.querySelector('nl-app'); if (!nlApp) return null; var root = nlApp.shadowRoot || nlApp; var captcha = root.querySelector('cloud-demo-captcha'); if (captcha) { var cRoot = captcha.shadowRoot || captcha; var container = cRoot.querySelector('#container'); if (container) container.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return 'captcha_visible'; } return 'captcha_state_showCaptcha_' + nlApp.showCaptcha;
